title: carex viridiflora
intro: Carex viridiflora, also known as the green-fruit sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Carex viridiflora are said to include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating respiratory problems. Carex viridiflora is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
